title: Job Openings at Candel FZE
content:
The Candel FZE is a manufacturing company engaged in the development, production, marketing and distribution of agrochemicals, specialised fertilisers, seeds and allied products in Nigeria. It is located in the Lekki Free Zone, Ibeju- Lekki, Lagos; near Dangote Refinery.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Trainee Civil Engineer

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	We are looking for a responsible Trainee Civil Engineer who will work under the the General manager facilities and Maintenance


Job Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Monitor and supervise all civil works and construction activities within the factory premises.
	Assist in the maintenance and upkeep of factory buildings, roads, drainage systems, and other infrastructure.
	Conduct regular inspections of facilities and identify maintenance needs.
	Coordinate contractors and ensure work is completed according to specifications, quality standards, and timelines.
	Prepare progress reports and provide regular updates to the Factory Manager.
	Support project planning, budgeting, and documentation for civil engineering works.
	Ensure compliance with safety, environmental, and regulatory requirements.
	Maintain records of maintenance activities, inspections, and project reports.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized institution - with a minimum of second class honours upper division
	0 – 2 years of relevant experience (NYSC completed or in progress is an advantage).
	Basic knowledge of construction methods, building maintenance, and project supervision.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications; knowledge of AutoCAD is an added advantage.
	Our Ideal candidate is aged not more than 30 years old.


Application Closing Date: 22nd July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Admin / Regulatory Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos

Job Summary


	The Admin / Regulatory Officer is responsible for ensuring regulatory compliance, reviewing and managing legal and corporate documents, coordinating statutory filings, and providing administrative support to facilitate efficient business operations.
	The role serves as a link between the organization and relevant government agencies, regulatory bodies, external solicitors, and other stakeholders.


Responsibilities


	Monitor and ensure compliance with applicable laws, regulations, and company policies.
	Liaise with regulatory authorities, government agencies, and other external stakeholders on behalf of the company.
	Prepare, process, and submit statutory filings, permits, licenses, and regulatory documentation as required.
	Review contracts, agreements, memoranda, and other legal documents to ensure compliance and protect the company's interests.
	Ensure all company documentation is properly filed, updated, and readily accessible.
	Perform other administrative duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Law (LL.B.) and qualification to practice law is an added advantage.
	1 - 2 years of experience in regulatory compliance, legal administration, corporate affairs, or a similar role.
	Additional qualification in Public Administration, Business Administration, or a related field will be an advantage.
	Strong knowledge of regulatory and statutory compliance requirements.
	Our Ideal candidate should not be more than 27 years old.


Application Closing Date: 16th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) Blow / Injection Moulding Machine Operator

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	We are looking for a motivated individual to join our Production Team as a Blow / Injection Moulding Machine Operator.


Job Responsibilities


	Operate and monitor Blow and Injection Moulding machines.
	Set up machines, adjust parameters, and ensure smooth production operations.
	Carry out quality checks on finished products.
	Detect and report machine faults or production issues.
	Perform routine machine cleaning and basic maintenance.
	Ensure compliance with safety and production standards.
	Maintain accurate production records.


Requirements


	2–3 years of experience operating Blow / Injection Moulding machines.
	OND from a Nigerian University.
	Good understanding of plastic processing and machine operations.
	Ability to troubleshoot basic machine issues.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced production environment.
	Good attention to detail and commitment to quality.


Application Closing Date: 10th August, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Solar & Inverter Battery Engineer",
  "description": "LVTOPSUN (Guangdong LVTOPSUN New Energy Co., Ltd.) isa professional Chinese manufacturer specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of lithium-ion energy storage batteries and systems, particularly for home and commercial use, offering solutions like LiFePO4 batteries, battery packs, and energy storage containers. Established in 2008, they focus on high-quality, safe, long-lasting products for solar energy integration, with business in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Solar &amp; Inverter Battery Engineer

Job Location: Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Descripton


	The Solar/Inverter Engineermaintains, and repairs solar PV systems and inverter/battery setups, focusing on ensuring reliable off-grid/hybrid power by managing components like panels, charge controllers, batteries (tubular, lithium), and inverters, troubleshooting faults, performing site surveys, sizing systems, training users, and ensuringsafety protocolsare met for residential, commercial, and industrial clients.


Core Responsibilities


	Maintenance &amp; Repair: Diagnosing faults, repairing faulty inverters, UPS, and batteries (AGM, Lithium), performing routine servicing, and conducting preventive maintenance.
	System Design &amp; Sizing: Conducting site assessments, designing efficient solar layouts, sizing components (panels, batteries, inverters) for specific energy needs, and creating system schematics.
	Technical Support &amp; Training: Providing expert advice to clients, answering technical questions, and training users on system operation, maintenance, and safety.
	Performance Monitoring: Using energy meters and clamp meters to test system performance, analyze energy production, and optimize efficiency.
	Safety &amp; Compliance: Adhering to safety standards (e.g., breaker installation), identifying hazards, and ensuring systems comply with electrical codes.
	Reporting: Documenting all repairs, maintenance, and installations, and reporting on common issues and potential system improvements.


Qualifications


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in Electrical Engineering, Renewable Energy or its equivalent.
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant and progressive experience.


Essential Skills:


	Strong electrical/electronic knowledge, including DC/AC circuits, soldering, and PCB repair.
	Proficiency in diagnostic tools.
	Understanding of solar PV principles, energy efficiency, and relevant safety.


Key Areas of Focus in Nigeria:


	Diverse Applications: Working on stand-alone, hybrid, and grid-connected systems for homes, businesses, and industries.
	Battery Expertise: Handling various battery technologies (Lead-Acid, Lithium) and related components like charge controllers and breakers.
	Troubleshooting: Addressing common issues like power fluctuations, battery discharge, and inverter failures prevalent in diverse power environments.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: voxaby2@yahoo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Solar & Inverter Battery Engineer Job at Lvtopsun New Energy Company Limited




        
    

        
        LVTOPSUN (Guangdong LVTOPSUN New Energy Co., Ltd.) isa professional Chinese manufacturer specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of lithium-ion energy storage batteries and systems, particularly for home and commercial use, offering solutions like LiFePO4 batteries, battery packs, and energy storage containers. Established in 2008, they focus on high-quality, safe, long-lasting products for solar energy integration, with business in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Solar & Inverter Battery Engineer

Job Location: Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Descripton
     

            
    




	The Solar/Inverter Engineermaintains, and repairs solar PV systems and inverter/battery setups, focusing on ensuring reliable off-grid/hybrid power by managing components like panels, charge controllers, batteries (tubular, lithium), and inverters, troubleshooting faults, performing site surveys, sizing systems, training users, and ensuringsafety protocolsare met for residential, commercial, and industrial clients.


Core Responsibilities


	Maintenance & Repair: Diagnosing faults, repairing faulty inverters, UPS, and batteries (AGM, Lithium), performing routine servicing, and conducting preventive maintenance.
	System Design & Sizing: Conducting site assessments, designing efficient solar layouts, sizing components (panels, batteries, inverters) for specific energy needs, and creating system schematics.
	Technical Support & Training: Providing expert advice to clients, answering technical questions, and training users on system operation, maintenance, and safety.
	Performance Monitoring: Using energy meters and clamp meters to test system performance, analyze energy production, and optimize efficiency.
	Safety & Compliance: Adhering to safety standards (e.g., breaker installation), identifying hazards, and ensuring systems comply with electrical codes.
	Reporting: Documenting all repairs, maintenance, and installations, and reporting on common issues and potential system improvements.


Qualifications


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in Electrical Engineering, Renewable Energy or its equivalent.
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant and progressive experience.


Essential Skills:


	Strong electrical/electronic knowledge, including DC/AC circuits, soldering, and PCB repair.
	Proficiency in diagnostic tools.
	Understanding of solar PV principles, energy efficiency, and relevant safety.


Key Areas of Focus in Nigeria:


	Diverse Applications: Working on stand-alone, hybrid, and grid-connected systems for homes, businesses, and industries.
	Battery Expertise: Handling various battery technologies (Lead-Acid, Lithium) and related components like charge controllers and breakers.
	Troubleshooting: Addressing common issues like power fluctuations, battery discharge, and inverter failures prevalent in diverse power environments.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates within and around Ago Palace, Okota, Festac, Mile 2 and environs are highly preferable.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager",
  "description": "Radisson Hotel Group is one of the world&#39;s largest and most dynamic hotel groups with seven distinctive hotel brands with more than 1,100 hotels in destinations around the world. Our portfolio of hotel brands includes: Radisson Collection, Radisson Blu, Radisson, Radisson RED, Park Plaza, Park Inn by Radisson and Country Inn &amp; Suites by Radisson.

Radisson Hotels&rsquo; highest priority is the health, safety &amp; security of our guests, employees and business partners worldwide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location: Maitama Ave, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	As a General Manager you are responsible for leading and supporting your team on a daily base and ensure the successful operation of the hotel.
	You will be the representative person of our RHG brand by delivering memorable moments to our guests and team.


Responsibilities


	Be responsible for the P&amp;L of the hotel and oversee the daily operations.
	Plan and supervise the activities of an extensive and diverse workforce, to ensure the smooth and profitable running of the business.
	Be a strong and professional business leader, ensuring that hotel team members work as a well-functioning team.
	Operate the hotel in a manner that represents the brand standards and exceed guest expectations.
	Responsible for actively communicating and executing the company strategies.
	Play a key role between the central team and the owners


Qualifications


	You have experience in hotel management or in a related field.&nbsp;
	You have excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.&nbsp;
	You are a strategic thinker, problem-solving skills and passionate for hospitality&nbsp;
	You will balance executing and delivering the master plan with a strategic focus on guest experience, revenue generation and achieving commercial results for our stakeholders.&nbsp;
	You will work with Heads of Department to maximize business opportunities and brand reputation, as well as ensuring adherence to legislation, due diligence requirements and managing the hotel budget.&nbsp;
	Reporting to the District Director Nigeria and/or Managing Director Sub Sahara Africa.&nbsp;&nbsp;


We are looking for:


	Flexibility and a positive, Yes I Can! Attitude &nbsp;
	An eye for detail &nbsp;
	Is a creative problem-solver &nbsp;
	Passionate about creating extraordinary service&nbsp;
	Ability to work as part of a team to ensure guest satisfaction&nbsp;
	Strong verbal communication skills &nbsp;
	Likes having fun at work &nbsp;
	Experience in a similar position is beneficial but not essential &nbsp;
	Languages: English&nbsp;
	MICE and sales experience within the Nigerian market&nbsp;
	Experience in a resort is a plus.

General Manager Job at Radisson Hotel Group




        
    

        
        Radisson Hotel Group is one of the world's largest and most dynamic hotel groups with seven distinctive hotel brands with more than 1,100 hotels in destinations around the world. Our portfolio of hotel brands includes: Radisson Collection, Radisson Blu, Radisson, Radisson RED, Park Plaza, Park Inn by Radisson and Country Inn & Suites by Radisson.

Radisson Hotels’ highest priority is the health, safety & security of our guests, employees and business partners worldwide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location: Maitama Ave, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	As a General Manager you are responsible for leading and supporting your team on a daily base and ensure the successful operation of the hotel.
	You will be the representative person of our RHG brand by delivering memorable moments to our guests and team.


Responsibilities


	Be responsible for the P&L of the hotel and oversee the daily operations.
	Plan and supervise the activities of an extensive and diverse workforce, to ensure the smooth and profitable running of the business.
	Be a strong and professional business leader, ensuring that hotel team members work as a well-functioning team.
	Operate the hotel in a manner that represents the brand standards and exceed guest expectations.
	Responsible for actively communicating and executing the company strategies.
	Play a key role between the central team and the owners


Qualifications


	You have experience in hotel management or in a related field. 
	You have excellent communication and interpersonal abilities. 
	You are a strategic thinker, problem-solving skills and passionate for hospitality 
	You will balance executing and delivering the master plan with a strategic focus on guest experience, revenue generation and achieving commercial results for our stakeholders. 
	You will work with Heads of Department to maximize business opportunities and brand reputation, as well as ensuring adherence to legislation, due diligence requirements and managing the hotel budget. 
	Reporting to the District Director Nigeria and/or Managing Director Sub Sahara Africa.  


We are looking for:


	Flexibility and a positive, Yes I Can! Attitude  
	An eye for detail  
	Is a creative problem-solver  
	Passionate about creating extraordinary service 
	Ability to work as part of a team to ensure guest satisfaction 
	Strong verbal communication skills  
	Likes having fun at work  
	Experience in a similar position is beneficial but not essential  
	Languages: English 
	MICE and sales experience within the Nigerian market 
	Experience in a resort is a plus.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant to the Managing Director",
  "description": "FTI Credit is a reputable non-bank micro financial institution with a strong presence in public sector lending and headquartered on the Mainland, Lagos State.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant to the Managing Director
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Description


	The Personal Assistant will manage the Managing Director&rsquo;s daily schedule, coordinate meetings, and ensure effective diary management.
	The role involves handling correspondence, preparing documents and presentations, organizing travel arrangements, and managing expenses.
	The Personal Assistant will also maintain filing systems, support follow-up on key actions, and liaise with internal and external stakeholders to ensure smooth communication.
	The position requires a high level of professionalism, confidentiality, and ability to anticipate needs in a fast-paced environment.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Human Resources Management, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, Psychology, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 3 years of relevant experience
	Possess effective Diary Management and organizational skills.
	Possess clear and professional Communication skills, both written and verbal.
	Possess proven experience coordinating Travel Arrangements and related logistics.
	Have proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and basic digital tools.
	Demonstrate discretion, reliability, and the ability to handle confidential information.
	Have strong time management skills and the ability to prioritize multiple tasks.
	Possess strong Executive Administrative Assistance and Personal Assistance skills , with prior experience supporting senior leadership.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@fticredit.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Personal Assistant to the Managing Director Job at FTI Credit




        
    

        
        FTI Credit is a reputable non-bank micro financial institution with a strong presence in public sector lending and headquartered on the Mainland, Lagos State. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant to the Managing Director
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Description
     

            
    




	The Personal Assistant will manage the Managing Director’s daily schedule, coordinate meetings, and ensure effective diary management.
	The role involves handling correspondence, preparing documents and presentations, organizing travel arrangements, and managing expenses.
	The Personal Assistant will also maintain filing systems, support follow-up on key actions, and liaise with internal and external stakeholders to ensure smooth communication.
	The position requires a high level of professionalism, confidentiality, and ability to anticipate needs in a fast-paced environment.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree in Human Resources Management, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, Psychology, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 3 years of relevant experience
	Possess effective Diary Management and organizational skills.
	Possess clear and professional Communication skills, both written and verbal.
	Possess proven experience coordinating Travel Arrangements and related logistics.
	Have proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and basic digital tools.
	Demonstrate discretion, reliability, and the ability to handle confidential information.
	Have strong time management skills and the ability to prioritize multiple tasks.
	Possess strong Executive Administrative Assistance and Personal Assistance skills , with prior experience supporting senior leadership.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Jobvet Services - Our client, a Restaurant, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented Accountant to manage financial records for our restaurant. The successful candidate will contribute to maintaining accurate financial data and ensuring timely reporting


Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain financial records and reports
	Monitor and reconcile cash flow and accounts
	Assist in budgeting and forecasting activities
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal policies
	Collaborate with management to optimize financial processes


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting or Finance
	Proven experience as an accountant, preferably in the hospitality sector
	Strong understanding of accounting principles and practices
	Proficiency in accounting software and MS Office
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Jobvet24@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Accountant Job at Jobvet Services




        
    

        
        Jobvet Services - Our client, a Restaurant, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented Accountant to manage financial records for our restaurant. The successful candidate will contribute to maintaining accurate financial data and ensuring timely reporting


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Prepare and maintain financial records and reports
	Monitor and reconcile cash flow and accounts
	Assist in budgeting and forecasting activities
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal policies
	Collaborate with management to optimize financial processes


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting or Finance
	Proven experience as an accountant, preferably in the hospitality sector
	Strong understanding of accounting principles and practices
	Proficiency in accounting software and MS Office
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
